positive: A stylized, clean-line illustration of a celestial fox (kitsune) sitting gracefully among stylized, bioluminescent cherry blossom branches. The fox should have a powerful, elegant silhouette and be rendered in a minimalist, neo-traditional Japanese woodblock print style. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, muted gold, cherry blossom pink, and crisp off-white. The composition must be centered and framed for a square print, with strong graphic contrast between the black outlines and the colored areas. Include subtle geometric patterns in the background for texture, emphasizing clean separation and boldness suitable for apparel printing. Studio lighting, vector art quality, highly detailed, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, realistic photography, 3d render, grayscale, bad composition, cluttered
